The `SelectionSort` algorithm works as follows:

```tactics
void SelectionSort(int a[], int array_size)
{

        min = i;

            if (a[j] < a[min])
                min = j;
        }
        temp = a[i];
        a[i] = a[min];
        a[min] = temp;
    }
```
